testcase.name: API Endpoints › registry endpoint should return valid JSON
API Endpoints › MCP endpoint should be accessible
API Endpoints › chat endpoint should handle POST requests
API Endpoints › chat endpoint should require messages array
Health Checks › main page should load successfully
Health Checks › page should have correct metadata
Health Checks › static assets should be accessible
Basic Chat Flow › should load the chat interface
Basic Chat Flow › should allow typing in the textarea
Basic Chat Flow › should disable submit button when textarea is empty
Basic Chat Flow › should display user message after sending
Basic Chat Flow › should submit message on Enter key
Basic Chat Flow › should allow Shift+Enter to create new lines without submitting
Basic Chat Flow › should display suggestion buttons
Basic Chat Flow › should send message when clicking a suggestion
Basic Chat Flow › should show loading state after sending message
Model Selection › should have model selector visible
Model Selection › should display model options when clicked
Conversation History › should display multiple messages in conversation
Free Tool Usage › should use free random number tool via suggestion @slow
Free Tool Usage › should handle add tool via chat @slow
Free Tool Usage › should handle get_random_number tool via chat @slow
Paid Tool Request Flow › should request premium random number tool via suggestion @paid

property.name: skip
property.value: Skipping paid tool test - SKIP_PAID_TESTS is true or CDP credentials not available

testcase.name: Paid Tool Request Flow › should display tool requiring payment @paid
Paid Tool Request Flow › should handle paid tool error gracefully @paid
Paid Tool Request Flow › should show payment information in tool output @paid
Payment Flow Mock Tests › should display suggestion for paid tool
Payment Flow Mock Tests › should send paid tool request message
Payment Flow Mock Tests › should handle streaming response for paid tool request
UI Responsiveness › should load without console errors
UI Responsiveness › should be responsive on mobile viewport
UI Responsiveness › should be responsive on tablet viewport
UI Responsiveness › should handle rapid message sending
UI Responsiveness › should maintain scroll position correctly
Error Handling › should handle network errors gracefully
Error Handling › should recover after retry button click
Error Handling › should handle empty message submission gracefully
Error Handling › should handle very long messages
Error Handling › should handle special characters in messages
Accessibility › should have proper ARIA roles
Accessibility › should support keyboard navigation
API Endpoints › registry endpoint should return valid JSON
API Endpoints › MCP endpoint should be accessible
API Endpoints › chat endpoint should handle POST requests
API Endpoints › chat endpoint should require messages array
Health Checks › main page should load successfully
Health Checks › page should have correct metadata
Health Checks › static assets should be accessible
Basic Chat Flow › should load the chat interface
Basic Chat Flow › should allow typing in the textarea
Basic Chat Flow › should disable submit button when textarea is empty
Basic Chat Flow › should display user message after sending
Basic Chat Flow › should submit message on Enter key
Basic Chat Flow › should allow Shift+Enter to create new lines without submitting
Basic Chat Flow › should display suggestion buttons
Basic Chat Flow › should send message when clicking a suggestion
Basic Chat Flow › should show loading state after sending message
Model Selection › should have model selector visible
Model Selection › should display model options when clicked
Conversation History › should display multiple messages in conversation

Free Tool Usage › should handle add tool via chat @slow
Free Tool Usage › should handle get_random_number tool via chat @slow

property.name: skip
property.value: Skipping paid tool test - SKIP_PAID_TESTS is true or CDP credentials not available

testcase.name: Paid Tool Request Flow › should display tool requiring payment @paid
Paid Tool Request Flow › should handle paid tool error gracefully @paid
Paid Tool Request Flow › should show payment information in tool output @paid

Payment Flow Mock Tests › should send paid tool request message
Payment Flow Mock Tests › should handle streaming response for paid tool request

UI Responsiveness › should be responsive on mobile viewport
UI Responsiveness › should be responsive on tablet viewport

UI Responsiveness › should maintain scroll position correctly
